message: I wonder if that female reporter is here.
I'm a bit hesitant to meet Eva, though.
I was thinking I should question Eva about the article.
But when I came, Eva was out and not home.
That's unfortunate, but I guess I'll have to come back.
It seems Eva still hasn't returned.
Oh, that's too bad. I thought you might be surprisingly my type.
You're always handsome, no matter when I see you.
The cluttered room has an unmistakable vibe of an editorial department.
Looking around, there’s no one but Eva. I wonder if everyone is out on assignments?
Eva is looking at me with an attitude that makes her seem like she's about to lean back in her chair. She's radiating something intense from her body, and it's a bit intimidating.
You look at me with such passionate eyes.
You still have that usual attitude, but,
it feels like your sharpness has softened since we last met.
Eva, giving me a scrutinizing glance, is sitting with her legs crossed, looking a bit anxious.
So, what brings you here today?
It's about Guy, as you might expect.
Oh, that’s unfortunate, you’re not going to listen.
You meet with me, yet you won’t share even a bit of information?
Ahaha, you're quite the selfish man, aren’t you?
You're a little lord, aren't you?
That's not true, after all. You're really well-bred, aren't you?
I want to see you naked.
More than that, why don't you become a nude model? I could even have you as my exclusive model!
Oh my, you’re being cold, aren’t you? Hehe.
Did you know that I’m actually a really busy person?
It's work time right now, right?
Yes, that’s right! I’m in the middle of working. Why would you come to interrupt me knowing that?
If you answer what I want to know honestly, I won’t bother you again.
You’re a real idiot, aren’t you?! Sorry, but I'm heading out for an interview now. Can you leave already?
Trying to run away with that, huh?
Hmph! If I wanted to run away, I wouldn't meet you. Don’t underestimate me.
No matter how many times we meet, I can’t tell you the important stuff. Now, I really have to go for the interview.
I told you I can’t tell you that.
About the article related to Guy.
You said you have a reliable source.
I have no idea what you’re talking about.
Hey darling, only get persistent in bed.
Hehehe, you're blushing and it's so cute!
It doesn’t mean anything if you found out about that.
You should just go home since you're busy.
No way, Gai didn’t set this up, right?
Are you fixated on Gai's article?
I just can't leave it alone as a friend.
Why do you care when he hasn't said anything? That's kind of weird.
I'm close with Gai too. You're not thinking of wanting to monopolize him, are you?
Oh, I don’t think there’s normal or abnormal when it comes to love.
I don’t even want to talk about that.
I don't care about that person at all.
Yeah, it did. You came to yell with me the other day, remember?
Oh no, do you think I wrote that article because something happened between her and me?
You, a detective, are so shallow in your thinking, it's funny.
I don’t care about that woman at all.
I'm really hurt by the article you wrote.
But I just said the truth.
I told you it has nothing to do with me.
Is it an article you set up because you want to break up?
What are you saying as if you understand?
Well, if that were the case, it wouldn't be impossible.
So, are you happy about that? Or sad?
Why did you write that article?
Just because it's a fact doesn’t mean you can write anything.
Oh no, what are you so fired up about?
I wrote the article myself. But if you want to know more about its content, go investigate on your own!
I know that it’s all nonsense.
Oh, what grounds do you have to say something like that?
Stop getting in the way of my business.
If you could be my boyfriend, then I could tell you slowly when the time comes.
What? You want to know my measurements?
Hehe, you're fixated on this delicious-looking bust, aren't you?
The best way to get to know me is to sleep in the same bed.
If only I knew that, I could ask them and find out who’s spreading such rumors.
Eva won’t just tell me, but I don’t want to back down either.
thinking that Guy and Eva know each other and he’s supplying her with information?
If that's the case, could it be that Guy?
did this article because he wanted to break up?
he’s the one suffering the most.
When things aren’t going well with Guy, seeing such an article splashed on the front page is like a cruel blow.
Ideally, it should be Guy, not me, protesting,
and he should be the one to protect her.
However, I honestly wonder if he would do that now.
I wonder how he is doing now.
During this tough time he's been feeling down, why did that article come out?
It feels like the timing is just too perfect.
Or could it be that, without my knowing, Guy and
had already reached a decisive breaking point?
I’m starting to lose track of what the truth is.
